SEARCH
Package io.github.javainvaders

Class Main

java.lang.Object
com.badlogic.gdx.ApplicationAdapter
io.github.javainvaders.Main
All Implemented Interfaces:
com.badlogic.gdx.ApplicationListener
public class Main extends com.badlogic.gdx.ApplicationAdapter
Main entry point for Java Invaders. Orchestrates the game loop, delegates rendering/input to the helper classes and ties evreything togeter.
Author:
Larissa R. G.; Vinicius S. F.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    (package private) static class 
    Main.Explosion
    Tiny data class for a timed explosion animation.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    private boolean
    allAliensDead()
    Returns true if every alien is dead.
    private boolean
    allPlayersDead()
    Returns true when both players are dead with no lives remaining.
    private void
    awardLevelBonus()
    Awards completion bonus to players that are still alive or have lives left.
    private void
    checkCollisions()
    Checks bullet/alien, bomb/player, and alien/player collisions.
    private void
    cleanUp()
    Removes expired explosions from the list.

    void
    dispose()

    drawAlien(Alien a)
    Draws an alien using shape primitives.

    Draws small ship icons representing remaining lives for a player.

    Draws the ship body and "wings" using shape primitives.

    dropBomb()
    Picks a random alive alien to drop a bomb.

    handleMenu(float dt)
    Delegates main-menu input to screenManager and acts on the result.

    Delegates pause-menu input to screenManager and acts on the result.

    Initialises (or re-initialises) the current level.

    Marks a player as dead and starts the respawn/blink animation.

    Reads the save file and restores game state, or starts new if file is missing/bad.

    moveAliens()
    Moves all alive aliens one step, and triggers descent when they hit a wall.

    renderGame()
    Draws the entire gameplay frame: ships, aliens, bullets, bombs, HUD.

    Writes current game state to a local save file.

      Active explosion animations.

    • level

      private int level
      Current level number (1-3).

    • bombTimer

      private float bombTimer
      Countdown until next bomb is droped.

    • bombInterval

      private float bombInterval
      How often (in seconds) a bomb is droped. Decreases with level.

    • alienMoveTimer

      private float alienMoveTimer
      Countdown until aliens take another step.

    • alienMoveInterval

      private float alienMoveInterval
      Time between alien movement ticks. Decreases with level.

    • alienDirX

      private float alienDirX
      Current horizontal direction of alien movement (+1 or -1).

    • alienDescend

      private boolean alienDescend
      True when aliens should descend on the next movement tick.

    • levelCompleteTimer

      private float levelCompleteTimer
      Countdown shown on the level-complete screen.

    • bonusAwarded

      private int[] bonusAwarded
      Bonus points awarded to each player at level end.

    • saveFeedbackTimer

      private float saveFeedbackTimer
      Timer driving the "Saved!" feedback text fade.

    • loaded

      private boolean loaded
      Flag set during loadGame() so initLevel() knows not to overwrite the loaded player state.

    • initialShootTimer

      private float initialShootTimer
      Short grace period at level start so holding shoot doesnt instantly fire a bullet.

  • Method Details

    • create

      public void create()
      Specified by:
      create in interface com.badlogic.gdx.ApplicationListener

    • render

      Specified by:
      render in interface com.badlogic.gdx.ApplicationListener

    • dispose

      public void dispose()
      Specified by:
      dispose in interface com.badlogic.gdx.ApplicationListener
      Overrides:
      dispose in class com.badlogic.gdx.ApplicationAdapter

    • handleMenu

      private void handleMenu(float dt)
      Delegates main-menu input to screenManager and acts on the result.

    • handlePause

      private void handlePause(float dt)
      Delegates pause-menu input to screenManager and acts on the result.

    • startNewGame

      private void startNewGame()
      Starts a fresh game from level 1 with full lives.

    • initLevel

      private void initLevel()
      Initialises (or re-initialises) the current level. If loaded is true, player stats are left untouched so the loaded save data persists.

    • updateGame

      private void updateGame(float dt)
      Main update step while in the GAMEPLAY state.

    • updatePlayer

      private void updatePlayer(Player p, float dt, int left, int right, int shoot)
      Updates a single player: handles movement input, shoot cooldown and respawn blink animation.
      Parameters:
      p - the player to update
      dt - delta time
      left - key code for moving left
      right - key code for moving right
      shoot - key code for shooting

    • moveAliens

      private void moveAliens()
      Moves all alive aliens one step, and triggers descent when they hit a wall.

    • dropBomb

      private void dropBomb()
      Picks a random alive alien to drop a bomb.

    • checkCollisions

      private void checkCollisions()
      Checks bullet/alien, bomb/player, and alien/player collisions.

    • killPlayer

      private void killPlayer(Player p)
      Marks a player as dead and starts the respawn/blink animation.
      Parameters:
      p - the player to kill

    • cleanUp

      private void cleanUp()
      Removes expired explosions from the list.

    • allAliensDead

      private boolean allAliensDead()
      Returns true if every alien is dead.

    • allPlayersDead

      private boolean allPlayersDead()
      Returns true when both players are dead with no lives remaining.

    • updateLevelComplete

      private void updateLevelComplete(float dt)
      Handles the level-complete countdown and transitions to next level or game-over.

    • awardLevelBonus

      private void awardLevelBonus()
      Awards completion bonus to players that are still alive or have lives left.

    • saveGame

      private void saveGame()
      Writes current game state to a local save file.

    • loadGame

      private void loadGame()
      Reads the save file and restores game state, or starts new if file is missing/bad.

    • renderGame

      void renderGame()
      Draws the entire gameplay frame: ships, aliens, bullets, bombs, HUD.

    • drawShip

      private void drawShip(Player p, com.badlogic.gdx.graphics.Color c)
      Draws the ship body and "wings" using shape primitives.
      Parameters:
      p - the player whose ship to draw
      c - color of the ship

    • drawAlien

      private void drawAlien(Alien a)
      Draws an alien using shape primitives. Different types get extra decorative bits (antennas, top knob).
      Parameters:
      a - the alien to draw

    • drawLives

      private void drawLives(Player p, float x, float y, com.badlogic.gdx.graphics.Color c)
      Draws small ship icons representing remaining lives for a player. Also draws a blinking icon while the player is respawning.
      Parameters:
      p - player whose lives to draw
      x - left edge where the icons start
      y - vertical position of the icons
      c - color for the icons
